_comment: EuroNCAP protocol thresholds. Update these when protocols change - no code edits needed.
_README: FULL PLAIN-LANGUAGE GUIDE: see CONFIG_GUIDE.md (what every key means, which are protocol constants vs site settings, examples).
Prefer Excel? Edit config.xlsx instead and run with --config config.xlsx. Regenerate it after JSON changes: python tools/make_config_xlsx.py
Verify any edit without running a validation: python validator.py --check-config --config config.json
Edit VALUES only - never the Python. Any key starting with '_' is documentation and is ignored by the loader.
Add a NEW scenario type: add ONE entry under 'scenarios' keyed by its tag - it is auto-registered for detection.
_filename_grammar_comment: Scenario base name = <program>_<type>_<n>VUT_<n><TargetType>_<n>Imp (e.g. AEB_CCFtap_10VUT_30GVT_50Imp). CH_NM_02 validates this structure and cross-checks the values.
_associated_files_comment: Workbooks that ship beside the 7 base files. {base} expands to the scenario base name. 'functional' is the ENCAP Test-Automation file checked by CH_FB_01; 'review' is the manual checklist being replaced by this tool's output.
_junction_detect_comment: Safety net so an un-listed turn/crossing scenario is not silently skipped: if the .xodr has a junction whose connecting roads turn at or below this radius (m), RD_03-06 + SC_10 run even when the tag is not in junction_scenario_prefixes. Lane-structure junctions (no tight arcs) stay excluded.
_geometry_tolerances_comment: Tuning knobs for geometry checks (previously hardcoded in Python). Safe to leave at defaults.
_curve_radii_comment: Protocol Part 2 (constant-radius arc) values for CPTA/CCFtap/CMFtap/CBTA paths. Source: EuroNCAP Frontal Collisions v1.1 Table 1.2.4. Used by CH_SC_07 to PASS/FAIL instead of MANUAL_REVIEW when VUT speed and turn direction are known.
_ASSUMPTIONS_TO_VERIFY: These values were inferred by tooling. Verify against EuroNCAP protocol before treating as definitive:
scenarios.*.type (longitudinal/crossing/head-on) - inferred from scenario name; confirm each scenario type is correct.

scenarios.*.vut_speed_range_kmh - CONFIRMED from EuroNCAP RAG db (adas_workspace/data/index/encap.db): CCFhol/CCFhos [30,100], CCFtap [10,25], CPNCO [20,60], CPTA [10,60]. Outstanding: CCRs/CCRb/CCRm/CCCscp speed ranges not yet confirmed.
scenarios.*.impact_overlap_pct - cross-checked against filename token (e.g. '50Imp', '10Imp'). CPTA corrected 50->10. Confirm protocol table values match.

curve_part2_radii_m - CONFIRMED from EuroNCAP Frontal v1.1 Table 1.2.4: Nearside 10km/h=8m, Farside 10km/h=9m, 15km/h=11.75m, 20-25km/h=14.75m. Nearside radii for 15km/h and 20-25km/h not yet in table (add when available).
CONFIRMED values (do NOT change): junction radius 8m (CH_RD_03), leftmost road at (0,0,0) (CH_RD_04), sim time 100-150s (CH_SC_04), lane width 3.5m (CH_RD_01), decel -4m/s2 (CH_MR_02).

CONFIRMED by official Review_Checklist_V12 screenshots (2026-05-29): RR export Driving Side = Left (traffic_handedness LHT); export Catalog settings = None (catalog files optional in NM_03); simulation_time_by_speed_s 35/40/45 max 60 matches official VUT speed table; CH_SC_22 wording 'All obstructions should be placed in NCAP Asset folder in RR'; SOV definition 'can either be a GVT or a real vehicle' (sov_entity_names exemption).

naming_convention.description: Scenario name must contain a recognised EuroNCAP scenario tag followed by optional speed suffix

_scenarios_comment: EuroNCAP taxonomy. type is one of longitudinal/crossing/head-on (turn-across-path maps to crossing; turn geometry is handled by junction_scenario_prefixes + curve_part2_radii_m). impact_overlap_pct is the per-instance designed overlap used by SC_16/17; the FILENAME Imp token is validated against allowed_impact_overlaps, not this value. vut_speed_range_kmh / target_speed_kmh from Euro NCAP Crash Avoidance - Frontal Collisions v1.1; left unset where the protocol value is a range or unconfirmed (NM_02 then skips that sub-check).
